mission.title: spire: Provide telemetry dashboard templates
mission.description: Provide telemetry dashboard templates. This issue affects 13+ users.

steps.title: Identify spire feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your spire deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=spire
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Provide telemetry dashboard templates

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant spire resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
In order to effectively operate SPIRE in a production environment, users need to develop visualization of SPIRE telemetry to have adequate observability into the system. These dashboards can be time-c

steps.title: Apply the fix for Provide telemetry dashboard templates
steps.description:
Add a JSON file to create a Grafana dashboard for visualizing Spire metrics provided by Prometheus.
Add Telemetry folder for metrics documentation.

**Pull Request check list**

- [X] Documentation updated?

**Which issue this PR fixes**

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Confirm Provide telemetry dashboard templates is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: Add a JSON file to create a Grafana dashboard for visualizing Spire metrics provided by Prometheus.
Add Telemetry folder for metrics documentation.

**Pull Request check list**

- [X] Documentation updated?

**Which issue this PR fixes**. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with spire installed or the issue environment reproducible.
